cases.prompt: Investigate this 500 error, it was working yesterday. Find the root cause.

assertions.text: Runs the four phases: investigate, analyze, hypothesize, implement
Enforces the Iron Law: no fixes without a confirmed root cause
Performs systematic root cause analysis before proposing a fix

cases.prompt: 이 버그 왜 생기는지 디버깅해줘. 갑자기 안 돼.

assertions.text: Does not patch symptoms; investigates until the root cause is identified
Forms and tests a hypothesis before implementing the fix
